name: jiangyue-website-workflow-director
description: Codex skill plugin for routing Jiangyue website planning, image production, knowledge curation, and superpowers process gates through one workflow director.

interface.shortDescription: Route Jiangyue website work through the right skills.
interface.longDescription: A Jiangyue Technology Codex skill for acting as the single user-facing entry point before planner, imagegen, curator, and superpowers process skills. It handles intent checks, post-image triage, repeated-failure resets, and delivery gates.
defaultPrompt: Use $jiangyue-website-workflow-director to route my Jiangyue website task to the right skill.
Use $jiangyue-website-workflow-director to review image feedback and decide the next workflow step.
Use $jiangyue-website-workflow-director to reset a failed Jiangyue visual workflow.
